records.ety: [It. madonna my lady. See Dame, Donna, and cf. Madame, Monkey.]

defs: My lady; -- a term of address in Italian formerly used as the equivalent of Madame, but for which Signora is now substituted. Sometimes introduced into English.
A picture of the Virgin Mary (usually with the babe).
quotes: The Italian painters are noted for drawing the Madonnas by their own wives or mistresses.
